name: ratchet
description: Agentic optimization loop with high watermarking

scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 src/cli.ts --outfile dist/ratchet-macos && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 src/cli.ts --outfile dist/ratchet-linux && bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 src/cli.ts --outfile dist/ratchet-windows.exe
